ground_truth.title: 10 Free Accounting Tools for Small Businesses
ground_truth.author: Jessica Elliott
ground_truth.main_content:
As a small business owner, you know how quickly expenses can add up. Fortunately, you don't have to sacrifice quality to find affordable accounting software. No-fee bookkeeping apps offer basic accounts receivable and invoicing, expense tracking, and bank reconciliation features. This guide explores the 10 best free accounting tools for small businesses and three vendors offering 30-day free trials.

Wave is the best free accounting software for invoicing and estimates. The Wave Starter plan is free forever. It provides intuitive mobile apps and allows unlimited invoices, customers, estimates, products, and vendors. One user can access accounting and invoicing tools through desktop and mobile devices, but it costs extra to capture receipts or connect bank accounts digitally.

Zoho Books is the best free bookkeeping software for micro businesses. It offers a free version for micro-businesses earning $50,000 or less in annual revenue. One user and an accountant can send up to 1,000 invoices and enter 1,000 or fewer expenses yearly. Zoho's free bookkeeping app supports W9 and 1099 reporting and syncs with multiple banks and credit cards.

ZipBooks is the best free accounting app for unlimited contacts and payments. ZipBooks Starter is free forever for one user. It connects to one bank account, allows unlimited invoicing, and supports Square and PayPal payments. ZipBooks automatically classifies new contacts as vendors or customers and supports unlimited records.

NCH Express Accounts is the best free desktop software for small teams. It is free desktop accounting software for businesses with five employees or fewer. Time-saving features like order and invoice automation help small teams with repeat customers. It works on Windows (7 to 11) and macOS 10.5 and above.

Akaunting provides the best open-source accounting software for customization. It provides free online accounting software for small businesses. The On-Premise Standard Plan allows unlimited invoicing and bill paying. Because Akaunting is open-source, you can modify the code to fit your business needs.

Brightbook is the best free online accounting software for creative freelancers. It is a free online accounting system for small businesses with one to five employees. Unlike other free bookkeeping software, Brightbook doesn't track mileage.

Manager is the best free Linux accounting software with offline access. It is a free forever accounting platform for Linux, macOS X, and Windows. The database format is standardized, meaning you can transfer files between computers with different operating systems.

Odoo offers the best free accounting software for profit tracking and budgeting. It offers free and paid business apps for finance, sales, and human resources. The stand-alone Odoo Accounting app supports unlimited users and synced bank or cash accounts.

LedgerSMB is the best free ERP accounting software for growing businesses. It is a free ERP program that integrates sales, invoicing, shipping, purchasing, and accounting into one system. You can deploy it on-premise or online.

GnuCash is the best free desktop accounting software for data privacy. It is a free, small business accounting tool that runs exclusively on desktops, with Windows, macOS X, and Linux support. It doesn't require a cloud account; no data leaves your device.

If free software for small business accounting doesn't meet your needs, consider a free trial. Leading platforms give you 30 days to explore advanced features. QuickBooks Online allows you to manage accounting, cash flow, and payroll in one dashboard. Xero helps you track global income, expenses, and taxes with real-time syncing. FreshBooks automates time tracking, invoicing, and recurring client billing.

The Wave Starter plan is free forever and provides intuitive mobile apps.
Zoho Books offers a free version for micro-businesses earning $50,000 or less in annual revenue.
